use_cases: Displaying status labels or tags on products and content
Showing categorization and metadata in card or list views
Indicating notification counts or alert states in UI
Providing visual hierarchy with variant-based emphasis
Supporting accessibility with proper focus ring states
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component with four variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for displaying status indicators, tags, and metadata in UI applications. Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling and includes standard focus ring accessibility features. Commonly used in data tables, cards, and navigation systems to convey categorical information.
